task_description:
【强制执行模式】以下任务必须实际执行，不要只描述或规划。你必须使用 write_file、run_shell 等工具动作来完成任务。禁止只输出文字分析。

原始任务：设计一个"无畏契约(Valorant)战绩分析"网页的主页设计图。要求：
- 清晰的信息架构，包含：玩家基本信息（头像、昵称、等级）、战绩统计（KDA、胜率、总场次）、最近5场比赛记录、英雄使用排行、排名段位显示
- 色调：暗色主题（深蓝或深紫为主），符合Valorant游戏风格
- 布局：顶部导航栏、左侧玩家卡片、中央主内容区、右侧统计侧边栏
- 字体层级清晰，数据展示直观
- 保存为 PNG 格式，分辨率 1920x1080 或以上
保存到 ~/Desktop/valorant-design.png

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

# 创建 1920x1080 的画布
width, height = 1920, 1080
img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), color='#0a0e27')  # 深蓝紫色背景
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# 定义颜色方案（Valorant 风格）
color_bg = '#0a0e27'        # 深蓝
color_card_bg = '#1a1f3a'   # 卡片背景
color_accent = '#ff4655'    # Valorant 红色强调
color_accent_gold = '#f4a261' # 金色强调
color_text_main = '#ffffff'  # 白色文本
color_text_sub = '#b8bcc4'   # 灰色文本
color_rank_gold = '#e8a76a'  # 等级金色

# ============== 顶部导航栏 ==============
header_height = 80
draw.rectangle([(0, 0), (width, header_height)], fill='#0f1420')
draw.line([(0, header_height), (width, header_height)], fill='#ff4655', width=2)

# 导航栏文字
try:
    title_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 32)
    nav_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 18)
except:
    title_font = ImageFont.load_default()
    nav_font = ImageFont.load_default()

draw.text((50, 25), 'VALORANT STATS', font=title_font, fill=color_accent)
draw.text((1600, 30), 'PROFILE', font=nav_font, fill=color_text_sub)

# ============== 左侧玩家卡片 (200 ~ 520 宽度) ==============
card_left = 30
card_top = 120
card_width = 280
card_height = 320

# 玩家卡片背景
draw.rectangle(
    [(card_left, card_top), (card_left + card_width, card_top + card_height)],
    fill=color_card_bg,
    outline=color_accent,
    width=2
)

# 模拟头像圆形 (中心位置 140, 210)
avatar_r = 45
avatar_x = card_left + card_width // 2
avatar_y = card_top + 60
draw.ellipse(
    [(avatar_x - avatar_r, avatar_y - avatar_r),
     (avatar_x + avatar_r, avatar_y + avatar_r)],
    fill=color_accent_gold,
    outline=color_accent,
    width=3
)

# 玩家昵称和等级
try:
    name_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 20)
    info_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 14)
except:
    name_font = ImageFont.load_default()
    info_font = ImageFont.load_default()

draw.text((card_left + 20, card_top + 120), 'Player_Pro', font=name_font, fill=color_text_main)
draw.text((card_left + 20, card_top + 150), 'Level: 45', font=info_font, fill=color_rank_gold)
draw.text((card_left + 20, card_top + 180), 'Rank: RADIANT', font=info_font, fill=color_rank_gold)

# 排名进度条
draw.rectangle(
    [(card_left + 20, card_top + 215), (card_left + card_width - 20, card_top + 225)],
    fill='#2a2f44',
    outline=color_text_sub,
    width=1
)
draw.rectangle(
    [(card_left + 20, card_top + 215), (card_left + 20 + 200, card_top + 225)],
    fill=color_accent,
    width=0
)
draw.text((card_left + 20, card_top + 235), 'Radiant 87/100 RR', font=info_font, fill=color_text_sub)

# ============== 右侧统计侧边栏 (1520 ~ 1920) ==============
stats_left = 1520
stats_top = 120
stats_width = 370
stats_height = 800

draw.rectangle(
    [(stats_left, stats_top), (stats_left + stats_width, stats_top + stats_height)],
    fill=color_card_bg,
    outline=color_accent_gold,
    width=2
)

# 统计标题
draw.text((stats_left + 20, stats_top + 20), 'STATISTICS', font=name_font, fill=color_accent_gold)

# 统计数据
stats_y = stats_top + 70
stats_items = [
    ('K/D/A', '2.45 / 1.20 / 8.32'),
    ('Win Rate', '58.7%'),
    ('Total Matches', '342'),
    ('Current Streak', '5 Wins'),
    ('AVG Kills', '18.2'),
    ('AVG Deaths', '7.4')
]

for title, value in stats_items:
    draw.text((stats_left + 20, stats_y), title, font=info_font, fill=color_text_sub)
    draw.text((stats_left + 20, stats_y + 25), value, font=name_font, fill=color_accent)
    stats_y += 80

# ============== 中央主内容区 (320 ~ 1500) ==============
main_left = 320
main_top = 120
main_width = 1200
main_height = 350

# 最近5场比赛标题
draw.text((main_left, main_top), 'RECENT MATCHES', font=name_font, fill=color_accent_gold)

# 5场比赛卡片
match_y = main_top + 50
match_height = 55
matches = [
    ('WIN', '13-11', 'Split', 'Jett', '18 Kills'),
    ('WIN', '13-8', 'Bind', 'Phoenix', '22 Kills'),
    ('LOSS', '11-13', 'Haven', 'Reyna', '19 Kills'),
    ('WIN', '13-10', 'Ascent', 'Sage', '12 Kills'),
    ('WIN', '13-9', 'Lotus', 'KAY/O', '20 Kills')
]

for result, score, map_name, agent, kills in matches:
    # 背景
    draw.rectangle(
        [(main_left, match_y), (main_left + 1100, match_y + match_height)],
        fill=color_card_bg,
        outline=color_text_sub,
        width=1
    )
    
    # 结果颜色
    result_color = color_accent if result == 'WIN' else '#ff6b6b'
    draw.text((main_left + 20, match_y + 15), result, font=info_font, fill=result_color)
    draw.text((main_left + 130, match_y + 15), score, font=info_font, fill=color_text_main)
    draw.text((main_left + 280, match_y + 15), map_name, font=info_font, fill=color_text_sub)
    draw.text((main_left + 450, match_y + 15), f'Agent: {agent}', font=info_font, fill=color_accent_gold)
    draw.text((main_left + 850, match_y + 15), kills, font=info_font, fill=color_accent)
    
    match_y += match_height + 10

# ============== 英雄使用排行 (底部) ==============
hero_top = 550
hero_left = main_left

draw.text((hero_left, hero_top), 'AGENT STATISTICS', font=name_font, fill=color_accent_gold)

hero_y = hero_top + 50
agents = [
    ('Jett', '89', '72.5%', '26 Matches'),
    ('Reyna', '84', '68.3%', '21 Matches'),
    ('Phoenix', '78', '65.1%', '18 Matches'),
    ('Sage', '71', '61.2%', '15 Matches')
]

for agent_name, avg_kills, winrate, matches_count in agents:
    # 背景
    draw.rectangle(
        [(hero_left, hero_y), (hero_left + 520, hero_y + 50)],
        fill=color_card_bg,
        outline='#2a3f5f',
        width=1
    )
    
    # 英雄名称
    draw.text((hero_left + 20, hero_y + 12), agent_name, font=info_font, fill=color_accent_gold)
    # 数据
    draw.text((hero_left + 180, hero_y + 12), f'{avg_kills} AVG Kills', font=info_font, fill=color_accent)
    draw.text((hero_left + 320, hero_y + 12), f'WR: {winrate}', font=info_font, fill=color_text_sub)
    draw.text((hero_left + 440, hero_y + 12), matches_count, font=info_font, fill=color_text_sub)
    
    hero_y += 60

# ============== 保存图片 ==============
output_path = '/Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant-design.png'
img.save(output_path, 'PNG')
print(f'✓ Design saved to {output_path}')
print(f'✓ Resolution: {width}x{height}')
print(f'✓ File size: {os.path.getsize(output_path) / 1024:.1f} KB')

action_checkpoints.reasoning: 使用 Python PIL 库创建高质量的 Valorant 战绩分析网页设计图。包含：暗色主题（深蓝紫色），顶部导航栏，左侧玩家信息卡片，中央比赛记录区，右侧统计侧边栏。直接生成 PNG 文件到指定路径。
